# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# This is an example of how you can define a resource group for your Azure Web App Stack using ARM template 
parameters:
- name: location
  type: string   # Location (e.g., West Europe) where the resources will be created in   
- name: appServicePlanName
  type: string     # Name of appservice plan to use for your webapp stack     
resources:
# Resource Group Definition      
- type: Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups   // Type and namespace definition       
  name: ${groupingKey}    // Parameterized resource group key        
properties:
  location: '${location}'     # Location of the resources (e.g., West Europe)     
# App Service Plan Definition      
- type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms   // Type and namespace definition       
  name: ${appServicePlanName}    // Parameterized appservice plan key        
properties:
  location: '${location}'     # Location of the resources (e.g., West Europe)
